---
title: "Ashley Lent"
subtitle: "Statistician"
# `profile.jpg` photo by Jan Tinneberg on https://unsplash.com
image: IMG_1659.jpg
about: # https://quarto.org/docs/websites/website-about.html
  template: solana
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/ashley1748

---

{{< lipsum 1 >}}

## Education

CSUF, Fullerton \| CA \| August 2024 - present

## Experience

Workplace \| Job title \| April 20XX - present
